data.title: Mohawk Industries Inc. shares drop 3.8% pre-market to $124 after Q3 earnings, with net sales at $2.8 billion.
data.description: Mohawk Industries Inc. (NYSE: MHK) saw a 3.8% decline in pre-market trading before Friday's opening, dropping to $124 following the release of its third-quarter earnings report. The stock had closed Thursday's regular session at $128.90, marking a 0.47% increase. In the third quarter, the Georgia-based flooring manufacturer reported net sales of $2.8 billion, which is a 1.4% increase from last year. Adjusted net sales were relatively unchanged. Earnings-per-share (EPS) stood at $2.67, down from $2.90 in the prior year. The company's three operating segments experienced varied performance. The Global Ceramic Segment saw a 4.4% increase in net sales and an adjusted operating margin of 8.1%. For more details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global genomic experts discuss Omics and AI in life sciences at Hangzhou, China. Over 100 scientists from 19 countries attend.
data.description: A pioneering model focusing on human-centered genomics foundation was introduced in Hangzhou, China on Oct. 24, 2025. Over 100 scientists and guests from 19 countries and regions convened to discuss the role of Omics and AI in life sciences. This marked the 20th gathering where the future of these technologies in the field was explored in-depth.

data.title: Lanvin Group appoints Mr. Jiyang Han as CFO effective Nov 1, 2025, overseeing financial operations. #NYSE #LuxuryFashion.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, Lanvin Group, a renowned luxury fashion company listed on NYSE under the ticker LANV, revealed the selection of Mr. Jiyang Han as their new Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Mr. Han is set to assume the role from November 1, 2025. As the CFO, he will be responsible for managing the financial operations of the Group.

data.title: America's most searched tacos and margaritas revealed on TacoTuesday.com, with Watermelon Margaritas leading the trend report.
data.description: In Orange County, California on October 24, 2025, exciting news has been revealed for taco enthusiasts. As per the latest trend report from TacoTuesday.com, Watermelon Margaritas have emerged as the most sought-after margarita flavor in America. This flavor has garnered significant attention, surpassing all others in searches on the website. Stay tuned for more updates on this delicious trend.

data.title: Ribo's siRNA therapy RBD1016 for Hepatitis Delta Virus granted EMA Orphan Drug Designation in 2025.
data.description: Suzhou Ribo Life Science Co., Ltd. and Ribocure Pharmaceuticals AB revealed that their joint development RBD1016 received Orphan Drug Designation (ODD) from the European Medicines Agency (EMA). The drug aims to specifically target Hepatitis D Virus. This significant milestone was announced in a press release from Beijing and Gothenburg, Sweden, dated October 24, 2025.

data.title: Low-code development platform market to reach $67.12B by 2030, growing at 20.61% CAGR from 2025's $26.30B.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, a recent study by Mordor Intelligence reveals that the low-code development platform market is currently worth USD 26.30 billion as of 2025. It is anticipated to climb to USD 67.12 billion by 2030, showing a significant growth rate at a CAGR of 20.61%. This data highlights a promising trend for organizations utilizing this technology for their development needs.

data.title: Autohome Inc. will release Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 6, 2025. Leading auto site in China.
data.description: Autohome Inc., a prominent online platform for automobile consumers in China, revealed plans to release its financial outcomes for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2025, prior to the commencement of trading on a specific date. The company's stock is listed on both the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ATHM, as well as on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange with the code 2518. The announcement was made in Beijing on October 24, 2025.

data.title: Tech Mahindra introduces new brand identity after 39 years, focusing on AI era with 'Scale at Speed™' promise.
data.description: In a move to adapt to the AI era, Tech Mahindra, a prominent global technology consulting and digital solutions provider, has unveiled a new brand identity. This move aims to reflect clarity and confidence, emphasizing the company's commitment to 'Scale at Speed™'. Headquartered in PUNE, India, the company, listed on the NSE as TECHM, caters to enterprises worldwide with its innovative technological offerings. The rebranding signifies a strategic shift for Tech Mahindra as it aligns itself to thrive in the era of artificial intelligence and digital transformation.

data.title: 1 in 4 job seekers fell for hiring scams in 2025 per PasswordManager.com survey, leading to shared passwords and lost money.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by PasswordManager.com reveals a concerning trend of individuals falling victim to hiring scams, resulting in an alarming number of shared passwords and financial losses. The report, released on October 24, 2025, highlights the extent of the issue, with a significant number of people affected. These fake recruiters have exploited unsuspecting individuals, leading to a surge in compromised passwords and monetary damages. PasswordManager.com emphasizes the importance of vigilance and awareness in safeguarding personal information online to prevent such fraudulent activities.

data.title: Sad news as LHV Group AS announces the passing of Supervisory Board member, Mr Heldur Meerits.
data.description: LHV Group AS has unfortunately shared the news of the passing of Mr. Heldur Meerits, a dedicated member of their Supervisory Board for a significant period of time.

data.title: Southside Bancshares, Inc. reported Q3-2025 results, including net income of $4.9M, decrease from $20.5M in Q3-2024, due to losses on securities sale and more; assets totaled $8.38B by Sep 30, 2025, with loans at $4.77B, deposits at $6.96B, and nonperforming assets at $35.6M. Management plans conference call for further discussion. Operating numbers highlighted for comparison and analysis.
data.description: Southside Bancshares, Inc. reported its financial results for Q3 2025, including restructuring its securities portfolio by selling $325 million of municipal and mortgage-backed securities at a loss of $24.4 million. Net income for the quarter was $4.9 million, a decrease of 76.1% from the same period in 2024. Total loans increased by $163.4 million, and deposits grew by $525.9 million from the previous quarter. Noninterest income increased by $2.3 million, and noninterest expense increased by $1.2 million. Asset quality showed an increase in nonperforming assets to $35.6 million. The company's total assets were $8.38 billion, with $4.77 billion in loans and $6.96 billion in deposits as of September 30, 2025. The company's net interest margin decreased to 2.94%, and the efficiency ratio was 52.99%. They declared a third-quarter cash dividend of $0.36 per share. The company's non-GAAP financial measures include net interest income (FTE), net interest margin (FTE), net interest spread (FTE), and efficiency ratio (FTE). They also discussed forward-looking statements and disclosed their capital resources and liquidity. The conference call to discuss the financial results was scheduled for October 24, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. CDT.

data.title: Weekly recap of 14 health press releases includes breakthrough clinical trials, suicide prevention series & period product giveaway for teens. NYC, Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: This week in healthcare news, several significant announcements were made through PR Newswire. Key highlights include groundbreaking clinical trials, the launch of a suicide prevention initiative, and a giveaway of period products aimed at teenagers. These developments come amidst a busy news cycle in the healthcare sector. NYC was the epicenter of these announcements, with the flurry of press releases reflecting a diverse range of initiatives aimed at addressing crucial health issues. Exciting breakthroughs in medical research, coupled with novel programs dedicated to mental health and adolescence, underscore the continuous effort to advance the healthcare field. The collective impact of these releases signifies a collaborative approach towards driving positive change in the industry, with a strong focus on innovation and community engagement.

data.title: Peter Schiff seeks moderator suggestions for debate with CZ. Elon Musk leading poll with 40%, Joe Rogan at 39.5%.
data.description: Renowned economist Peter Schiff recently sought input on potential moderators for an upcoming public debate against Binance co-founder CZ Zhao on the merits of Bitcoin versus tokenized gold. The debate has been confirmed to be in the works, with Schiff initiating a poll on X platform to determine the preferred moderator. Options included high-profile personalities such as Elon Musk, Joe Rogan, Tucker Carlson, and Russell Brand. Currently, Musk is leading the poll with 40% of the votes, closely followed by Rogan at 39.5%. The poll is ongoing and available for participation. For more details, refer to a comprehensive article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Flagstar Bank reported a Q3 2025 net loss of $36 million, improved from previous quarters, with an EPS of $0.11. C&I loans increased by $448 million (3%), with new loan originations rising by 41% ($1.7 billion). Operating expenses were controlled, down 1% on an adjusted basis. Provisions for credit losses decreased by 41%. Total assets were $91.7 billion, down 1% from the previous quarter. Non-interest income was $94 million, up 22% from the previous quarter. Total loans were $62.7 billion, down 2% from the previous quarter. Total deposits were $69.2 billion, down 1% from the previous quarter. Adjusted net loss attributable to common stockholders was $31 million._PREP_SIGN_CEO stated improved operating results aligned with the company's strategic priorities. Net interest income was $425 million, down 17% year-over-year. NIM increased to 1.91%. Non-interest income was $94 million, down 17% year-over-year. Operating expenses were $522 million, down 27% year-over-year. Total allowance for credit losses was $1,128 million. Total non-accrual loans were $3,272 million. Total assets were $91.7 billion. CEO mentioned the completion of the holding company reorganization._profit_NET_LOSS_READ_ON_PRNEWSWIRE.COM
data.description: Flagstar Bank, N.A. reported an increase in C&I loans by $448 million or 3%, driven by new loan originations rising 41% or $1.7 billion, with commitments growing 26% or $2.4 billion. Net interest margin improved by 10 basis points to 1.91%. Operating expenses remained controlled, with a 1% increase on a GAAP basis and a 1% decrease on an adjusted basis. CRE par payoffs totaled $1.3 billion including 42% substandard loans. Provision for credit losses decreased by 41%. Capital and liquidity remained strong. The bank simplified its corporate structure on October 17, 2025. Total assets were $91.7 billion, down 1% since June 30, 2025. Total revenue for the third quarter was $519 million, up 5% from the previous quarter. Net loss for the quarter was $36 million, an improvement from the previous quarter and the same quarter last year. The net loss for the nine months ended September 30, 2025, was $231 million, an improvement from the same period the previous year. CEO Joseph M. Otting commented on the positive performance, highlighting growth in C&I lending and reduction in problem loans and CRE exposure. Total ACL was $1.1 billion, representing 1.8% of total loans. NCOs decreased by 38%. The net charge-off rate decreased to 0.46%. Operating expenses totaled $522 million, up 2% from the previous quarter. Non-interest income in Q3 was $94 million, a 22% increase from the previous quarter. Overall, Flagstar Bank showed positive trends in loan growth, operating expenses, and asset quality, signaling a successful execution of its strategic priorities.

data.title: Tri Pointe Homes named to Fortune Best Workplaces for Women list for 4th year, showing progress in diversity and support.
data.description: Acknowledgment of achievements signifies an ongoing advancement in diversity, equity, inclusion, and support for women at all echelons of the organization. This recognition highlights the strides made in promoting gender equality and opportunities, with a significant increase in female representation at various levels within the company.

data.title: Bankrate appoints Matt Fellowes as CEO to drive evolution of platform, empower users in making financial decisions.
data.description: Bankrate, a Red Ventures subsidiary, has named Matt Fellowes as the new CEO of the personal finance platform. Fellowes will lead the transformation of Bankrate into a tech-driven platform focused on empowering individuals to make informed financial decisions and connect with suitable products to achieve their goals. The company aims to shift from being a top financial marketplace to a cutting-edge platform that enhances people's financial confidence. This move is part of Bankrate's strategy to facilitate better financial navigation for users and establish stronger connections between consumers and financial institutions.
